name: AppBar
description: The top app bar is the page header — it names where the operator is and holds page-level actions: global search, notifications, account, and the page's primary action. On desktop it also hosts the action a phone would put in a FAB.
keyRule: Keep the top bar light — most navigation belongs in the left drawer/rail. The bar carries the title, global tools, and the one primary action for the page.

variants.name: Standard
variants.whenToUse: Default page header with title + actions.

variants.name: With primary action
variants.whenToUse: Hosts the page's contained primary action (the desktop replacement for a FAB).

variants.name: Contextual / selection
variants.whenToUse: Appears when items are selected; shows count + bulk actions.

variants.name: With search
variants.whenToUse: Expands an inline global search field.

anatomy.name: Action items
anatomy.description: search, notifications, the primary action, and overflow ⋮.

anatomy.name: Contextual bar
anatomy.description: a variant that replaces the title with a selection count + bulk actions.

behaviors.name: Scroll
behaviors.description: The bar stays fixed while content scrolls beneath it; it may gain a subtle shadow once content scrolls under it.

behaviors.name: Contextual switch
behaviors.description: Entering a selection mode swaps the standard bar for the contextual bar and back when selection clears.

behaviors.name: Responsive
behaviors.description: On narrower widths, secondary actions collapse into the overflow menu; the title truncates before the actions do.

specs.value: Often primary; if filled with orange, use dark text/icons or primary-dark — white on #F47735 fails AA. A white bar with dark text is the safer default for dense data screens.

props.name: title
props.description: Current page/section name shown as the title.

props.name: actions
props.description: Standard header actions (search, notifications, overflow, etc).

props.name: showNavigationIcon
props.description: Shows the nav toggle / back arrow leading element.

props.name: onNavigationIconClick
props.description: Handler for the leading nav icon.

props.name: contextual
props.description: Switches to the contextual / selection bar variant.

props.name: selectedCount
props.description: Number of selected items, shown in the contextual bar.

props.name: contextualActions
props.description: Bulk actions shown only while contextual is true.

props.name: onCloseContextual
props.description: Called when the contextual bar's close control clears selection.

doThis: Show the current location as the title.
Host one primary action here per page.
Switch to the contextual bar during selection.
Prefer a white bar + dark content for legibility.
dontDoThis: Don't crowd the bar with primary navigation — that's the drawer's job.
Don't place a FAB on desktop; use the bar's primary action.
Don't ship an orange bar with white text without checking contrast.
accessibility: Use a banner / header landmark; the title is a heading.
Icon actions carry aria-labels and visible focus.
The contextual bar announces the selection count.
Contrast of text/icons on the bar background must meet AA.

related.name: Menu
related.why: Overflow (⋮) page actions live in a Menu

related.name: NavigationDrawer
related.why: Primary navigation belongs in the drawer, not the bar
